description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a classic cylindrical shape, slightly bulging at the center and narrowing at the ends. The body is constructed from vertical wooden staves, held together by three wide, dark metallic hoops that are fastened with visible rivets. The wood has a warm, reddish-brown finish with a subtle grain texture, giving it a polished yet rustic appearance. The barrel sits on a simple wooden cradle stand, elevating it slightly off the ground for stability and ease of access. One end features a small brass spigot, indicating its use for dispensing liquids, while the opposite end is plain and sealed. There are no visible handles, lids, or external markings, and the overall design suggests it is intended for storage or serving of beverages in an urban or hospitality setting.
description: A polished wooden barrel with dark metal hoops, mounted on a wooden stand and featuring a brass spigot for dispensing liquids.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, three metal hoops, and the wooden stand.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular face of the barrel and the brass spigot at the bottom center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the metal hoops and stand, but the spigot is not visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, sealed end of the barrel with no spigot or additional features.
